title: DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES - 211info
text: FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT DETOXIFICATION AND SOBERING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients with a physically and emotionally stable environment to complete the detox process and prepare for transition into treatment. 1021 E Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 776-7086 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 776-7086 Telemedicine (541) 779-1282 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP (Jackson Care Connect and AllCareHealth), and most major insurers. Sliding-scale fees are available and no one will be turned away for an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable, and valid ID AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind main office. Access possible from E Main Street or Reddy Avenue Services: Detoxification Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TRANSITION HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FRESH START WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT
